goal: TC4 direct-neighbour tube suction propagation, jar untyped suction, original ore rarity, multi-filter sorting golem needed-list
changes: Replaced whole-network tube suction calculation with direct-neighbour propagation matching TC4 TileTube.calculateSuction.
Allowed empty/unfiltered jars to advertise untyped suction, so tubes can accept the first adjacent essentia aspect.
Kept v9.82 local one-unit tube transfer and did not restore source-to-destination network teleportation.
Restored TC4 infused-stone worldgen invariant to 8 attempts per chunk with vein size 6.
Expanded sorting golem needed-list from a single filter sample to multiple active ghost/filter samples, with count-based output checks.
gradle_build: not confirmed in sandbox because Gradle wrapper distribution requires services.gradle.org access
